title: Coffee Break
text: Coffee Break is a great spot for a quick bite with plenty of options. I especially love their panini and the sizzling brownie with ice cream. The ambience is also excellent and adds to the experience. Highly recommend visiting for brunch and trying their desserts.

title: Coffee Break
text: Good atmosphere with good food but the price is little bit more

reviewContext.Recommended dishes: Cakes, Chocolate Delight Pancake, Butterscotch Pastries, Butter Scotch, Sundaes, Costomized Cake

title: Coffee Break
text: The food is really very tasty and the cakes are the best.... The ambience is very comforting and gives a nice vibe... Though I would suggest that they should increase the variety of food items in their menu... All in all its the best place for dates, birthday party or even casual hangout...
responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for your wonderful support and review, we have add few products in our menu, please visit us & taste our new products, and please share your views and feedback. Thanks

title: Coffee Break
text: The best in Majithar. Very popular within SMIT folks. The pastries are baked fresh everyday. It was really good. Didn't expect this quality in Sikkim. Great ambience and service. Go for it.

title: Coffee Break
text: Good taste ,good quality ,price is also ok acording to Sikkim . pastries and muffins are good also , I didn't like the pizza here(thin crust) otherwise rest of the things are on point not soo great but good .you can spend the evening here with friends and family , atmosphere is good ,staffs behaviour is good.

title: Coffee Break
text: Everyone should visit this place once.... The food were absolutely amazing and the taste were just wowww....Great food with great hospitality.... And the service were amazing as well....

Soft and really delicious sponge as well as cream.

title: Imperfecto, Restro Lounge
text:
Before 7th may i had a very positive feelings about this restaurant.But on 7th of may i had a lunch at here which completely changed my opinion about their food & service .

When we went for lunch ,the restaurant was quite free but the waiter 1st suggested to change the seat without any proper reason we had done that which is quite inconvenient.

Food quality was too poor ,the laccha paratha we ordered was burned and we requested to change it but again they have served the same without changing .We had ordered  prawn salt pepper but they had served us one corn dish ,but during ordering we had shown the item in the menu to the waiter .

So this is the incident which happed with me so please be careful during ordering as it can spiil your mood .

title: Imperfecto, Restro Lounge

title: Imperfecto, Restro Lounge
text:
I had a wonderful experience at this restaurant! The food was absolutely delicious — every dish was fresh, flavorful, and beautifully presented. The ambiance was cozy and inviting, making it a perfect place to relax and enjoy a meal.

A special thanks to Priyanka Roy from the staff — she was incredibly polite, attentive, and made sure we were comfortable throughout our visit. Her warm and friendly service truly added to our experience. Highly recommend this place and will definitely be coming back!

title: Brunch cafe
text: First of all it's not a cafe. You get nothing with coffee on it and no proper snacks . It's more like those half fastfood and half sweet shop. Whn I went there they said that they are out of coffee all they had was packed goods and cold drinks. Lol how is it even possible?
responseFromOwnerText:
Tysm for review us at least 2* and by the way cafe means "small restaurant selling light meals and drinks" and it doesn't means cafe sales only coffee because our name is BRUNCH which collabs of breakfast n lunch and we haven't mention coffee in our name. Lastly we are sorry if we can't serve you coffee that day because we were closing our cafe that day so we were out of stock.
Hope we can serve u better in coming days do visit us again.
Thanks

title: BITE & BREW
text:
The place has a nice mix of cafe, restaurant, and bar vibes, so it works whether you’re just hanging out with friends, grabbing food, or staying a bit longer in the evening time.
The atmosphere is relaxed and comfortable, and the karaoke setup adds a fun element. Food was good, and the overall experience felt worth it—nothing overhyped, just a solid place to unwind.
Service was smooth and very cordial, and the location is convenient too, especially being close to the main road area. It is one of the go to hangout spots in Majhitar.
Definitely worth visiting.
responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for your wonderful feedback! We’re truly glad to hear that you enjoyed the overall vibe of our café, restaurant, and bar, and that it worked perfectly for your time with friends.
It’s great to know that you liked the relaxed atmosphere and had fun with our karaoke setup—that’s exactly the experience we aim to create for our guests. We’re also happy that you enjoyed the food and found the service smooth and cordial.
Your kind words about our location, convenience, and overall experience mean a lot to us. We’re especially grateful to be considered one of your go-to hangout spots in Majhitar!
We look forward to welcoming you again soon for more good food, great vibes, and memorable moments.

title: Punjabi Kitchen

title: Punjabi Kitchen
text: A great place to stop if you are going to or returning from Gangtok. We ordered two plate of chicken bharta, wanted to order three but the owner suggested to order two first and then one more if needed. Along with it we had tandoori roti which were softband crispy and totally made of atta. Plus two tall glasses of lassi which we shared among three of us. Pricewise moderate, quality and quantity fantastic.
responseFromOwnerText: Thank you mam for ur valuable feedback

title: Punjabi Kitchen
text:
unfortunately there's no option to revert on your not so nice reply on my first review. so, i had to make all this effort to write it down again. If your tables were "booked" may be ur staff could have just told us POLITELY (which they did NOT) instead of being disrespectful on our faces. That's why we left without ordering. FEEDBACKS ARE TO LEARN AND IMPROVE .
